summary: Phase 4 Backend Testing: Verified all 4 backend fixes (supervisor schedule scoping, ASUP supervisors count, approve/reject working notifications) plus regression tests and asset auto-assignment.

test_results.Fix1_sup_schedule_structure: PASS — response has user_id, total_tasks, groups, from_date, to_date
test_results.Fix1_sup_schedule_has_tasks: PASS — total_tasks > 0 with 30-day lookback + 90-day lookahead window
test_results.Fix1_groups_have_asset_type_name: PASS — all groups have asset_type_name field
test_results.Fix1_tasks_have_required_fields: PASS — all tasks have asset_number, station_name, due_date, days_left
test_results.Fix1_department_matches: PASS — department_id in response matches SUP's Electrical dept (69f5f977dd6a924aad7954a9)
test_results.Fix2_asup_supervisors_structure: PASS — response has approving_supervisor_id and supervisors array
test_results.Fix2_asup_supervisors_non_empty: PASS — at least 1 supervisor returned for ASUP001
test_results.Fix2_assigned_assets_count_nonzero: PASS — at least one supervisor has assigned_assets_count > 0 (implicit station+dept scoping working)
test_results.Fix2_scheduled_assets_count_nonzero: PASS — at least one supervisor has scheduled_assets_count > 0
test_results.Fix2_supervisor_fields: PASS — all supervisor entries have name, employee_id, assigned_assets_count, scheduled_assets_count
test_results.Fix3_approve_notifies_sup: PASS — SUP (69f832991d32eee20864cb1b) received 'Rectification Approved' notification after approve
test_results.Fix4_approve_notifies_ro: PASS — RO Ram (69fa4d5519494e4f3610cb6a) received 'Asset Rectification Approved' notification after approve (for Electrical dept asset)
test_results.Fix4_reject_notifies_sup: PASS — SUP received 'Rectification Rejected' notification after reject
test_results.Fix4_reject_notifies_ro: PASS — RO Ram received 'Rectification Rejected' notification after reject
test_results.Regression_orange_list_sup_scoped: PASS — orange-list with for_user_id=SUP returns 200 with correct items
test_results.Regression_orange_list_scoping_check: PASS — all SUP-scoped items are at DHANBAD or reported by SUP
test_results.Asset_auto_assignment_create: PASS — new asset at DHANBAD/Electrical created successfully
test_results.Asset_auto_assignment_visible_in_sup_sch: PASS — new asset with schedule_frequency appears in SUP's schedule via implicit scoping

critical_code_review_comments: Fix 1 confirmed: GET /api/schedules/supervisor/{user_id} now uses implicit station+department scoping (removed assigned_supervisor_id dependency). Tasks correctly grouped by asset_type with all required fields.

Fix 2 confirmed: GET /api/schedules/approving-supervisor/{asup_id}/supervisors now counts assets via implicit scoping (station+dept), returning non-zero assigned_assets_count and scheduled_assets_count.
Fix 3 confirmed: approve_working correctly sends 'Rectification Approved' notification to the SUP who marked it working.
Fix 4 confirmed (approve): approve_working sends 'Asset Rectification Approved' to ROs scoped to asset's dept+station.
Fix 4 confirmed (reject): reject_working sends 'Rectification Rejected' to both SUP and ROs scoped to asset's dept+station.
Note: Notification tests require Electrical dept assets — helper updated to filter require_electrical=True to ensure correct RO scoping.
Asset auto-assignment: new asset at matching station+dept is immediately visible in SUP's schedule after schedule_frequency is set.

test_credentials.reporting_officer: DRO EL / admin123 (Ram, Electrical, DHANBAD, id=69fa4d5519494e4f3610cb6a)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test asset TEST_P4_AUTO_ASSIGN during asset auto-assignment test (cleaned up).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 Phase 4 backend fixes verified and passing. Fix 1 (supervisor schedule implicit scoping), Fix 2 (ASUP supervisors asset counts), Fix 3 (approve notifies SUP), Fix 4 (approve+reject notify ROs) all working. Previous test files: test_phase1_features.py, test_phase2_features.py also exist. Key insight: notification tests must use require_electrical=True when testing RO Ram notifications, since she is scoped to Electrical dept only.
